author: usagi
description: Track numeric goals, deadlines, countdowns, and branching learning roadmaps in a dockable dashboard. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Chen Wanxuan
manifest.description: Track numeric goals, deadlines, countdowns, and branching learning roadmaps in a dockable dashboard.
manifest.name: Progress Dock

name: Progress Dock

releases.author: ririririse
releases.description: Preserves the user-selected dock location when the plugin is unloaded, addressing the Obsidian Community automated review. Includes verified GitHub artifact attestations for main.js and styles.css.
releases.name: Progress Dock 1.0.5

releases.author: ririririse
releases.description: Adds GitHub artifact attestations for the published plugin files so Obsidian Community review can verify the release. Plugin behavior is unchanged from 1.0.3.
releases.name: Progress Dock 1.0.4

releases.author: ririririse
releases.description: Initial public release of Progress Dock. Track numeric progress with direct slider and value editing, manage DDL items in calendar and countdown views, and build sequential or parallel learning roadmaps. Data stays local in the Obsidian plugin data file.
releases.name: Progress Dock 1.0.3
